summary: Structural review of validation error hints. The hints field is purely additive to the validationError output JSON — no signature changes, all 15+ existing callers unaffected. Schema navigation logic is correct for direct properties and array items. Edge cases handled defensively: null schema returns empty hints, unknown keywords pass through with base info,  properties degrade gracefully (no crash, just missing type/description). getSchemaObject export is minimal and clean. One minor observation:  properties in schemas (created_at, worker, etc.) will not produce field_type or field_description hints since  is not resolved, but this is documented in the code comment and fails safe.
concerns: Properties defined via $ref (e.g. created_at, producer_type) will not yield field_type or field_description in hints — acceptable degradation but worth noting for future improvement
